case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ANGELICA MARIA LOPEZ REYNOSO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALTIST. DEFENDANT ANGELICA MARIA LOPEZ REYNOSO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED NOV-08-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, ANGELICA MARIA LOPEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REYNOSO, ANGELICA MARIA LOPEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, ANGELICA MARIA LOPEZ
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,156.91 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, ANGELICA MARIA LOPEZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, ANGELICA MARIA LOPEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, ANGELICA MARIA LOPEZ
